body.message: LOCK 015 addendum received from GPT. Tightens scope based on team feedback.
key_changes: Data source: manual/curated metadata ONLY. No filesystem scanning.
No config file reading — ephemeral metadata-in, readiness-object-out
Readiness status enum frozen: NOT_READY, PARTIAL_GOVERNANCE_READY, GOVERNANCE_SPINE_READY, RUNTIME_PREP_READY
RUNTIME_PREP_READY must exist but LOCK 015 must NOT return it
Capabilities tie directly to completed locks
Input tolerance: null, empty, malformed all handled safely
your_feedback_incorporated: Deterministic readiness_id formula → ACCEPTED (hash of sorted locks)
